$comment: Single source of truth for the whitelist.txt wire format. Consumed by scripts/generate-contract-constants.mjs (generated TS/Bash includes) and by windows/tests/Windows.ContractConstants.Tests.ps1 (a sync-guard that pins the existing Windows catalog functions to these same values). Probe lists are per-OS on purpose: unioning them would change agent behavior (see plan: Known Divergences #7).
